title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the Sprinters Stakes. On our
way to Nakayama Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text: Curren Chan! Good luck in today's race!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks, everyone. ♪ I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna steal everyone's hearts! ♪ Don't miss it!

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text:
Wooow!
Sooooo adorable!
Erupting cheers envelop us.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha. That was crazy. People were even calling
out to me at the racecourse. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's like I'm at the center of all the excitement. I
loooove it! ♪

I do feel like there's more excitement around her
than before. Or maybe her fans have just
changed.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Running in this atmosphere is totally gonna make
me cuter!
choice_data_list: I wonder what caused the big change.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's because of my "Let's Go! ♪ Summer Training"
series! I take it you haven't checked it out yet?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's because of my "Let's Go! ♪ Summer Training"
series! I take it you haven't checked it out yet?

"Let's Go! ♪ Summer Training" is a series she
started on her "Curren Channel ♪" on UmaTube
recently.

As the name suggests, it's a special new series she
made about summer camp and her daily training,
a slight departure from her normally cutesy
channel.

I've been watching every video as soon as they're
uploaded, but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if you watched them right away, you
probably didn't notice. I guess you totally are my
number one fan! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if you watched them right away, you
probably didn't notice. I guess you totally are my
number one fan! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All right, let me explain! The fifth video in the
series, "Cute Continent," is probably the best
example.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... One more!

text_block_list.name: On-screen Text
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan is exhausted. Still, she grits her teeth
and continues to push herself.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna get even faster. I'm gonna keep on
running so I can keep getting better!

text_block_list.name: On-screen Text
text_block_list.text: Trainer: Why do you try so hard?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I guess... to be the me I wanna be. I want
everyone to see me at my cutest.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Plus, sprints are super fun! I hope that by
watching me, everyone can get into them.

text_block_list.name: On-screen Text
text_block_list.text:
Just what does Curren Chan have planned as she
strives to master cuteness?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The Sprinters Stakes starts at 3:40 p.m. at
Nakayama Racecourse. Come see how serious I
can be!

text_block_list.name: On-screen Text
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Racecourse. Curren's home away from
home.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I think I did a good job on the editing. Take
a look at the views for the series.

"Cute Continent" seems to be doing particularly
well and has a lot of comments. Among them...

"Her resolve is amazing."
"I didn't care for her much before, but I might be
a fan now."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
This one says, "Curren Chan's a runner to watch in
this year's Sprinters Stakes!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The training series was actually pretty tough for
me... but it sure looks like it paid off!
choice_data_list: You really struck a chord with everyone.
You really struck a chord with everyone.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Totally seems like it, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Until now, I pulled people in on pure charisma,
and I always thought that was fine...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But that wasn't enough for the people who
wanted something more dramatic. I had to show
them the story I'm weaving.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's just like before—I did an interview, answered
questions, and people read about it. I need to do
that again.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's not that I myself need to change. I just need to change how I do things. Right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's not that I myself need to change. I just need to change how I do things. Right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've changed the minds of racing lovers on
UmaTube. I'd call that a great success. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now all I've gotta do is win! I can't waste
all this attention I've gotten for myself by losing!

Curren Chan is exuding self-confidence. If she can
keep this up, the Sprinters Stakes will be no
problem. Or at least, that's what I'd like to think.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay, then. Good luck today, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's do it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Flower's so cute.

Nishino Flower. A talented runner who looks to
be Curren Chan's biggest obstacle in today's race.
choice_data_list: Yeah, she's really pleasant and adorable.
Yeah, she's really pleasant and adorable.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's not what I mean. She's... too cute.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Did you know they call her the "Bento Fairy" on
Umatter?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The bento boxes she makes are super cute and
nutritious. She only recently started posting pics,
but she's already one of the top accounts.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Her level of cuteness has already earned her...
4.35 million followers!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: This race isn't gonna be as easy as I thought.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But still! I'm different now!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta go show everyone I'm the cutest one
here today. ♪
